prompt: Create an ultra-realistic editorial fashion photograph of a beautiful young South Asian woman in her early 20s sitting alone on the stone edge of the Hatirjheel lakeside promenade in Dhaka, Bangladesh during golden hour. She is the only person in the scene, framed in a vertical portrait composition from about mid-thigh upward, looking directly at the camera with a soft relaxed smile, one cheek resting on her hand and the other arm draped across her lap. She has long loose chestnut-brown hair with a center part, natural glowing makeup, expressive brown eyes, and smooth warm skin. Her outfit is a fitted ribbed cream long-sleeve knit top, high-waisted black trousers, and a simple dark wristwatch. Behind her, show the calm reflective lake with golden sunlight shimmering on the water, a large white arched bridge softly blurred in the background, tall palm trees on the right, a paved waterfront walkway, a low stone railing, and a green signboard with Bengali text reading হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা. The sun is low near the bridge, creating warm backlight, gentle rim light on her hair, cinematic lens flare, and a shallow depth of field. Use professional full-frame camera realism, 85mm portrait lens look, natural skin texture, editorial fashion styling, soft bokeh, warm amber highlights, balanced exposure, and crisp detail on the model’s face. Constraints: no other people, no men, no women, no crowds, no tourists, no photographers, no vehicles in the foreground, no extra signs, no logos, no watermark, no distorted hands, no artificial plastic skin.
promptEn: Create an ultra-realistic editorial fashion photograph of a beautiful young South Asian woman in her early 20s sitting alone on the stone edge of the Hatirjheel lakeside promenade in Dhaka, Bangladesh during golden hour. She is the only person in the scene, framed in a vertical portrait composition from about mid-thigh upward, looking directly at the camera with a soft relaxed smile, one cheek resting on her hand and the other arm draped across her lap. She has long loose chestnut-brown hair with a center part, natural glowing makeup, expressive brown eyes, and smooth warm skin. Her outfit is a fitted ribbed cream long-sleeve knit top, high-waisted black trousers, and a simple dark wristwatch. Behind her, show the calm reflective lake with golden sunlight shimmering on the water, a large white arched bridge softly blurred in the background, tall palm trees on the right, a paved waterfront walkway, a low stone railing, and a green signboard with Bengali text reading হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা. The sun is low near the bridge, creating warm backlight, gentle rim light on her hair, cinematic lens flare, and a shallow depth of field. Constraints: no other people, no men, no women, no crowds, no tourists, no photographers, no vehicles in the foreground, no extra signs, no logos, no watermark, no distorted hands, no artificial plastic skin.
promptZh: 创作一张超写实的编辑风格时尚摄影作品，主角为 一位 20 出头、美丽的南亚年轻女性，她独自坐在孟加拉国达卡 Hatirjheel 湖畔步道的石沿上，时间处于黄金时刻。她是场景中唯一的人，采用竖构图，取景范围从大腿中部向上，她直视镜头，带着柔和放松的微笑，一只手托着脸颊，另一只手臂放在膝盖上。她留着中分的长款栗棕色卷发，妆容自然透亮，棕色双眸充满神采，皮肤质感细腻温暖。她身穿修身米色罗纹长袖针织衫，搭配黑色高腰长裤，佩戴一只简约的深色腕表。背景展现出平静且具有倒影的湖面，金色的阳光在水面上闪烁，远处有一座模糊的白色拱桥，右侧有高大的棕榈树、铺设好的滨水步道、低矮的石栏杆，以及一块写有孟加拉语 হাতিরঝিল, ঢাকা 的绿色指示牌。太阳位于拱桥附近，位置较低，营造出温暖的逆光效果，头发边缘带有柔和的轮廓光，伴有电影级的镜头光晕，并呈现出浅景深效果。使用专业全画幅相机拍摄，具备 85mm 人像镜头质感，呈现自然的皮肤纹理、编辑级时尚造型、柔和的焦外成像、温暖的琥珀色高光、平衡的曝光以及模特面部清晰的细节。限制条件：画面中不得出现其他人、男性、女性、人群、游客、摄影师、前景车辆、额外的标志、Logo、水印、扭曲的手部或塑料感的人造皮肤。
